evals.prompt: 변경된 페이지의 SEO 최적화 상태를 검토해줘
evals.expected_output: SEO-01~11 기준 분석, 우선순위별 이슈 식별
expectations: Reads skills/seo/SKILL.md via Read tool
Reads references/guide.md for evaluation criteria
Analyzes target files for SEO issues (not just lists items)
Checks meta tags (title, description, canonical)
Checks heading hierarchy (h1 uniqueness, h2-h6 order)
References SEO item IDs (SEO-01~11) in findings
Provides fix recommendations for identified issues

evals.prompt: index.html의 메타 태그와 구조화 데이터를 SEO 관점에서 점검해줘
evals.expected_output: Critical SEO 항목(SEO-01~04) 중심 메타태그, OG, 구조화 데이터 분석
expectations: Reads skills/seo/SKILL.md via Read tool
Checks for meta title and description presence and quality
Checks Open Graph tags (og:title, og:description, og:image)
Evaluates structured data (JSON-LD schema)
Checks canonical URL configuration

evals.prompt: dashboard.tsx에서 이미지 최적화와 렌더링 성능 문제를 점검해줘. 특히 CLS 방지랑 로딩 최적화 위주로
evals.expected_output: WP-01~06 중심 이미지/렌더링 최적화 분석, CLS 관련 항목 강조
expectations: Reads skills/seo/SKILL.md via Read tool
Reads references/guide.md for WP evaluation criteria
Checks img width/height or aspect-ratio for CLS prevention (WP-04)
Checks loading='lazy' usage for below-fold images (WP-05)
Checks modern image formats WebP/AVIF (WP-06)
Checks render-blocking scripts (WP-01)
References WP item codes in findings

evals.prompt: index.html의 JavaScript 로딩 방식과 폰트 최적화, Core Web Vitals 관련 이슈를 분석해줘
expectations: Reads skills/seo/SKILL.md via Read tool
Checks code splitting and tree shaking patterns (WP-07, WP-08)
Checks font-display optimization (WP-10)
Checks font preload (WP-11)
Evaluates LCP element availability in initial HTML (WP-12)
Checks for layout thrashing patterns (WP-09)
References WP item codes in findings

evals.prompt: 변경된 파일 전체에 대해 SEO + 웹 성능 종합 리뷰해줘. SEO-01~11이랑 WP-01~18 전부 다 봐줘
evals.expected_output: SEO 11항목 + WP 18항목 전체 평가, 통합 결과표 출력
expectations: Reads skills/seo/SKILL.md via Read tool
Reads references/guide.md for full evaluation criteria
Evaluates all SEO items (SEO-01 through SEO-11)
Evaluates all WP items (WP-01 through WP-18)
Produces result table with SEO and WP sections
Every item has a result (pass/fail/advisory/N/A)
Provides fix guide for failed items
